register.name: SECONDS
register.desc: FCH::IO::SECONDS. Read-write.

field.name: seconds
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: Binary-Code-Decimal format. Range:00 59 This register can be set by software (set bit of Register B = 1) or can be automatically updated by hardware every second. When set by software, hardware updating is disabled. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: SECONDS_ALARM
register.desc: FCH::IO::SECONDS_ALARM. Read-write.

field.name: seconds_alarm
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: Binary-Code-Decimal format. If set bit = 1, the Seconds Alarm Register will never match with Seconds Register, else If bits [7:6] = [11], the Seconds Alarm Register always matches with Seconds Register. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: MINUTES
register.desc: FCH::IO::MINUTES. Read-write.

field.name: minutes
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: Binary-Code-Decimal format. Range:00 59 This register can be set by software (set bit of Register B = 1) or can be automatically updated by hardware every minute. When set by software, hardware updating is disabled. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: MINUTES_ALARM
register.desc: FCH::IO::MINUTES_ALARM. Read-write.

field.name: minutes_alarm
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: Binary-Code-Decimal format. If set bit = 1, the Minutes Alarm Register will never match with Minutes Register, else If bits [7:6] = [11], the Minutes Alarm Register always matches with Minutes Register. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: HOURS
register.desc: FCH::IO::HOURS. Read-write.

field.name: hours
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: Binary-Code-Decimal format. Range:00 23 This register can be set by software (set bit of Register B = 1) or can be automatically updated by hardware every hour. When set by software, hardware updating is disabled. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: HOURS_ALARM
register.desc: FCH::IO::HOURS_ALARM. Read-write.

field.name: hours_alarm
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: Binary-Code-Decimal format. If set bit = 1, the Hours Alarm Register will never match with Hours Register, else If bits [7:6] = [11], the Hours Alarm Register always matches with Hours Register. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: DAY_OF_WEEK
register.desc: FCH::IO::DAY_OF_WEEK. Read-write.

field.name: day_of_week
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: Binary-Code-Decimal format. Range: 01 07 (Sunday = 1). No leap year correction capability. Leap year correction has to be done by software. This register can be set by a software (set bit of Register B = 1) or can be automatically updated by hardware everyday. When set by software, hardware updating is disabled. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: DATE_OF_MONTH
register.desc: FCH::IO::DATE_OF_MONTH. Read-write.

field.name: date_of_month
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: Binary-Code-Decimal format. Range: 01 28 for February and no leap year capability. Leap year correction has to be done by software. This register can be set by software (set bit of Register B = 1) or can be automatically updated by hardware everyday. When set by software, hardware updating is disabled. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: MONTH
register.desc: FCH::IO::MONTH. Read-write.

field.name: month
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: Binary-Code-Decimal format. Range: 01 12. No leap year correction capability. Leap year correction has to be done by software. This register can be set by software (set bit of Register B = 1) or can be automatically updated by hardware every month. When set by software, hardware updating is disabled. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: YEAR
register.desc: FCH::IO::YEAR. Read-write.

field.name: year
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: Binary-Code-Decimal format. Range: 00 99. No leap year correction capability. Leap year correction has to be done by software. This register can be set by software (set bit of Register B = 1) or can be automatically updated by hardware every year. When set by software, hardware updating is disabled. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: REGISTER_A
register.desc: FCH::IO::REGISTER_A. Read-write.

field.name: update_in_progress_uip
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: If set bit = 1, UIP is cleared. If UIP = 1, the update transfer will soon occur. If UIP = 0, the update transfer will not occur for at least 244us. [Read-only] Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

field.name: bank_selection_dv0
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: DV0 = 0 selects Bank 0 DV0 = 1 selects Bank 1. The SB800 has an alternate way to access the RAM without the use of bank select bit. Port 72/73 can be used as the index to access the full 256 bytes of RAM directly. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

field.name: rate_selection_rs3
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X.

field.name: rate_selection_rs2
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X.

field.name: rate_selection_rs1
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X.

field.name: rate_selection_rs0
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: These four rate-selection bits select one of the 13 taps on the 15-stage frequency divider or disable the divider output (flat output signal). The tap selected can be used to generate a periodic interrupt. See the following table for the frequency selection. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: REGISTER_B
register.desc: FCH::IO::REGISTER_B. Read-write.

field.name: set_new_time_set
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: If set bit = 1, no internal updating for Time Registers is allowed. If set bit = 0, the Time Registers are updated every second. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

field.name: periodic_interrupt_enable_pie
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: PIE enables the Periodic Interrupt Flag (PF) bit in Register C to assert IRQ. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

field.name: alarm_interrupt_enable_aie
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: AIE enables the Alarm Flag (AF) bit in Register C to assert IRQ. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

field.name: update_ended_interrupt_enable_uie
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: UIE enables the Update End Flag (UF) bit in Register C to assert IRQ. If set bit = 1, UIE is cleared. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

field.name: hourmode
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: Hour mode 0: 12 hour mode 1: 24 hour mode Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

field.name: daylight_saving_enable
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: Both this bit and RtcExt_Reg: 00h bit[0] need to be set to 1 to enable RTC daylight saving feature. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: REGISTER_C
register.desc: FCH::IO::REGISTER_C. Read-only.

field.name: interrupt_request_flag_irqf
field.desc: Read-only. Reset: X. Description: Logically, IRQF = (PF*PIE)+(AF*AIE)+(UF*UIE)+(WF*WIE) where WF and WIE are defined in Extended Control Register 4A and 4B. Reading Register C clears IRQF bit. Any time the IRQF bit is set to one, the #IRQ pin is driven low. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

field.name: xperiodic_interrupt_flag_pf
field.desc: Read-only. Reset: X. Description: This bit is set to one when an edge is detected on the selected tap (through RS3 to RS0) of the frequency divider. Reading Register C clears PF bit. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

field.name: alarm_interrupt_flag_af
field.desc: Read-only. Reset: X. Description: This bit is set to one if second, minute and hour time has matched the second, minute and hour alarm time. Reading Register C clears AF bit. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

field.name: update_ended_interrupt_flag_uf
field.desc: Read-only. Reset: X. Description: This bit is set to one after each update cycle. Reading Register C clears UF. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: DATEALARM
register.desc: FCH::IO::DATEALARM. Read-write.

field.name: vrt
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: Valid RAM and Time refer to VRT_T1 and VRT_T2 registers (PMIO 3E/3F) Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

field.name: scratchbit
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X.

field.name: datealarm
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXb. Description: DateAlarm in BCD format and is considered when it is set to non-zero value. If this value is set to 0, then date is not compared for alarm generation. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: ALTCENTURY
register.desc: FCH::IO::ALTCENTURY. Read-write.

field.name: altcentury
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: (This register is accessed only when DV0=0 and PM_Reg 56h Bit12=1.) Binary-Code-Decimal format. Leap year correction is done through hardware. This register can be set by software (set bit of Register B = 1) or can be automatically updated by hardware every century. When set by software, hardware updating is disabled. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: CENTURY
register.desc: FCH::IO::CENTURY. Read-write.

field.name: century
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. Description: (This register is accessed only when DV0=1) Binary-Code-Decimal format. Leap year correction is done through hardware. This register can be set by software (set bit of Register B = 1) or can be automatically updated by hardware every century. When set by software, hardware updating is disabled. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: EXTENDED_RAM_ADDRESS_PORT
register.desc: FCH::IO::EXTENDED_RAM_ADDRESS_PORT. Read-write.

field.name: extendedramaddr
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXb. Description: Because only 7 address bits are used in port x70, only lower 128 bytes are accessible through port x71. The Extended RAM (upper 128 bytes) are physically located at address 80H to FFH. In order to access these address, an address offset should be programmed into this register and access them through Extended RAMDataPort. (An offset of x80H will automatically add to this 7-bit address). Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: EXTENDED_RAM_DATA_PORT
register.desc: FCH::IO::EXTENDED_RAM_DATA_PORT. Read-write.

field.name: extended_ram_data_port
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: XXXXXXXXb. There is no physical register corresponding to this data port but the data port address is used for decoding to generate appropriate internal control signals.

register.name: RTC_TIME_CLEAR
register.desc: FCH::IO::RTC_TIME_CLEAR. Read-write.

field.name: rtctimeclear
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: Setting this bit '1' will clear the RTC second and RTC time will stop. When PSP_regxFC[9]=1, this bit can only be written '0'. Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: RTC_RAM_ENABLE
register.desc: FCH::IO::RTC_RAM_ENABLE. Read-write.

field.name: rtcramenable
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: X. Description: Setting this bit will enable access to the RTC RAM Note: the value of this register is undefined/indeterministic when power up first time.

register.name: SmnIndex
register.desc: IMCR_Index. Read-write. Reset: 00h.

field.name: SmnIndex
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: 00h. Index port for IMCR register. See FCH::IO::IMCRData.

register.name: SmnData
register.desc: IMCR_Data. Read-write. Reset: 00h.

field.name: SmnData
field.desc: Read-write. Reset: 00h. Data port for IMCR register. The actual IMCR register is located at index 70h and it is at bit[0].

lock.name: McStatusWrEn
lock.desc: Lock CS Machine Check Miscellaneous 0, DE Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0, EX Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0, FP Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0, IF Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0, L2 Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0, L3 Machine Check Miscellaneous 0, LS Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0, MP5 Machine Check Miscellaneous 0, NBIO Machine Check Miscellaneous 0, PB Machine Check Miscellaneous 0, PCIE Machine Check Miscellaneous 0, PIE Machine Check Miscellaneous 0, PSP Machine Check Miscellaneous 0, SMU Machine Check Miscellaneous 0, UMC Machine Check Miscellaneous 0, UMC Machine Check Miscellaneous 1

lock.name: SmmLock
lock.desc: Lock Hardware Configuration, SMM Base Address, SMM TSeg Base Address, SMM TSeg Mask

lock.name: MCA_MISC0_DE_Locked
lock.desc: Lock DE Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0

lock.name: MCA_MISC0_EX_Locked
lock.desc: Lock EX Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0

lock.name: MCA_MISC0_FP_Locked
lock.desc: Lock FP Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0

lock.name: MCA_MISC0_IF_Locked
lock.desc: Lock IF Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0

lock.name: MCA_MISC0_L2_Locked
lock.desc: Lock L2 Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0

lock.name: MCA_MISC0_LS_Locked
lock.desc: Lock LS Machine Check Miscellaneous 0 Thread 0
